narrative:
North Olmsted-04-E (precinct in Cuyahoga County) has 1,116 registered voters, with 66.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 8.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 25.1%, a pronounced Democratic lean of 16.8 percentage points.
